subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #001 Nature is Governed by a Universal Law
subcodes.first_line: Nature is that condition or reality which outwardly is the source of the life and death, or, in other words, of the composition and decomposition
subcodes.first_line_orig: طبیعت کیفیتیست و یا حقیقتیست که بظاهر حیات و ممات و بعبارت اخری ترکیب و تحلیل
subcodes.subjects: @nature and God's will, @power of the mind over nature, @law of cause and effect, @composition and decomposition, @one universal law; attractive power of love, @man's distinction from the animal
